source: user directive 2026-04-24: '오 비용동일이면 제한없애줘!' + '자동충전이라서 잔액,예산등 언급되면서 중단 되지 않게'
rules: If doubling/quadrupling GPUs preserves total GPU-hours and shortens wall-clock, DO IT. No 4-GPU cap.
Balance/budget concerns NEVER halt a launch under this policy. Auto-charge absorbs all burn.
Short tasks (<2h wall on 1×H100) MAY stay at 1 GPU — not mandatory to scale.
Long tasks (>4h wall) SHOULD scale to whatever GPU count fits model memory + data-parallel topology.
Reports/status displays MUST NOT surface balance/budget figures when auto_charge_assumed=true.
Default per-pod GPU count for multi-pod launches: 4 (override via ANIMA_H100_GPUCOUNT_PER_POD env var).
Total cluster cap: NONE. Mk.XII 16-GPU plan stays intact; Stage-2 may scale from 4×1=4 up to 4×4=16 or beyond.
override: Explicit user directive required. Do NOT reintroduce 4-GPU cap or balance gates without written user consent.
